case_title: ZUKAV JEAN VS RESTONIC AKA SLEEPRITE INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RESTONIC AKA SLEEPRITE INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUKAV JEAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RESTONIC AKA SLEEPRITE INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $677.00 FILED BY ZUKAV JEAN AS TO DEFENDANT RESTONIC AKA SLEEPRITE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
